title: pedaliaceae
intro: The Pedaliaceae rank, also known as the Sesame family, refers to a small family of flowering plants. This family consists of approximately 15 genera and around 100 species, primarily found in tropical and subtropical regions. Pedaliaceae plants are characterized by their unique flowers, often with a distinctive shape and structure. They are commonly known for their showy, trumpet-shaped flowers and are often grown in gardens for their ornamental value.
